name: Notion
description: All-in-one workspace for notes, databases, wikis, and project management. Query databases, manage pages, and search content.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Notion is an all-in-one workspace that combines notes, databases, wikis, and project management. Use this plugin to query databases, manage pages, and search your Notion workspace. **Note:** Get your integration token at [Notion Integrations](https://www.notion.so/my-integrations).

tools.name: Get Database
tools.description: Retrieve a database object by its ID

database_id.description: The ID of the Notion database to retrieve

tools.name: Query Database
tools.description: Query a database to get a list of pages that match the specified filters and sorts

database_id.description: The ID of the Notion database to query

filter.description: Filter conditions to apply to the database query

sorts.description: Sort criteria for the query results

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 100, max 100)

tools.name: Get Page
tools.description: Retrieve a Notion page object by its ID

page_id.description: The ID of the Notion page to retrieve

tools.name: Create Page
tools.description: Create a new page in a Notion database or as a child of an existing page

parent.description: The parent database or page. Example: {"database_id": "xxx"} or {"page_id": "xxx"}

properties.description: Page properties as defined by the parent database schema

children.description: Array of block objects to append as children of the new page

tools.name: Update Page
tools.description: Update properties or archive a Notion page

page_id.description: The ID of the Notion page to update

archived.description: Set to true to archive (delete) the page, false to restore it

tools.name: Get Block Children
tools.description: Return a paginated list of child block objects for a given block

block_id.description: The ID of the block to get children for

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 100)

start_cursor.description: Cursor for pagination, from a previous response's next_cursor

tools.name: Append Block Children
tools.description: Append new children blocks to a parent block

block_id.description: The ID of the parent block to append children to

children.description: Array of block objects to append as children

tools.name: Search
tools.description: Search all pages and databases shared with the integration that match the query

query.description: Text to search for across page and database titles

filter.description: Filter results by object type. Example: {"value": "page", "property": "object"}

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return (max 100)

tools.name: List Users
tools.description: Return a paginated list of users for the workspace associated with the integration

page_size.description: Maximum number of users to return (max 100)

start_cursor.description: Cursor for pagination, from a previous response's next_cursor

tools.name: Get User
tools.description: Retrieve a user object using the user's ID

user_id.description: The ID of the Notion user to retrieve
